title: About Me
text: Hello. I am Hasnat Ahsan. I am a Computer Engineer. I have also completed my MBA. Currently I am doing my MS in Applied Business Analytics at the Boston University.

title: Projects
text: I have already completed projects related to analyze New York real estate data. I have also completed projects related to Amazon EC2 instance.
